dependencies: Third-party cloud infrastructure service providers for SaaS delivery
Strategic technology and software partners for embedded solutions
System integrators for customer implementation services
risks: Disruption of third-party cloud service providers could cause service interruptions
Failures by strategic partners or termination of partner relationships could adversely affect business
Reliance on partner ecosystem for go-to-market approach increases compliance risks

European Union General Data Privacy Regulation (GDPR) compliance

U.S. State Department trade sanctions
U.S. Department of Commerce export controls
United Nations Security Council sanctions
European Union Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
European Union Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD)
U.S. government focus on technology transactions with non-U.S. entities
Income tax regulations across multiple jurisdictions
Transfer pricing regulations in foreign jurisdictions
IRS procedural guidance requiring consent for accounting method changes
Section 174 U.S. tax legislation amendments
Global Intangible Low-Taxed Income (GILTI) regime
Foreign-Derived Intangible Income (FDII) regime
Base Erosion Anti-Abuse Tax (BEAT)
Massachusetts Business Corporation Act compliance
Securities Exchange Act Rule 14a-19 compliance
Sarbanes-Oxley Act Section 404(b) internal control requirements

sanction_risks: U.S. government focus on technology transactions with non-U.S. entities
Exposure to operations and employees in regions with political instability and armed conflict including Israel
